resources.string:
My name is Sarah. I wake up at 7 AM
every day. First, I brush my teeth and
wash my face. Then, I have breakfast
with my family. I usually eat cereal and
drink orange juice.

At 8 AM, I go to school. I study
English, Math, and Science. My
favorite subject is English! I have lunch
at noon with my friends. We talk and
laugh together.

After school, I go home at 3 PM. I do
my homework and play with my dog.
At 7 PM, we have dinner. Then I
watch TV or read a book. I go to bed
at 10 PM.
